ogTitle: Erowal Bay vs Erskine Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Erowal Bay and Erskine Park.
heading: Erowal Bay vs Erskine Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Erowal Bay, New South Wales and Erskine Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Erowal Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Erowal Bay or Erskine Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Erowal Bay has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Erskine Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Erowal Bay scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Erskine Park scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Erowal Bay or Erskine Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
